name: Migros Ticaret A.S.
summary: Migros Ticaret A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the retail sale of food and beverages, and consumer and durable goods. Its stores offer various products, including cosmetics, stationery, glass and kitchenware, electronic appliances, books, textiles, and other items, as well as groceries and other necessities. As of April 22, 2020, it had a total of 2233 stores with 2131 Migros and 59 Macrocenter in 81 provinces in Turkey and 43 Ramstore stores internationally covering an area 2.514.425 square meters. The company also operates Migros Sanal Market, an online food retailing site, as well as an online shopping website. In addition, it rents floor space in the shopping malls to other trading companies. Migros Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
